expectations.evidence: Valid JSON but does NOT match the supplier-profiler output schema. Uses 'supplier{}' instead of top-level 'ico'/'name', 'contracts.items[]' instead of 'contracts[]', 'red_flags.by_type{}' instead of 'flags[]'. No 'procurement' or 'rpvs' fields at all.
extractions.signatories.supplier_side includes {name: 'Jan Sutiak', role: 'konatel / statutarny zastupca'}.
supplier section has established_on '2022-11-16', nace_code '70220', nace_category, organization_size '1 zamestnanec'. Data sourced from ruz_entities.

No unified summary section with total_contracts/total_value/flag_count/key_flags. Data scattered: contracts.total_count=5, contracts.total_value=892261.56, red_flags.total_count=16 exist separately. risk_summary.key_concerns is prose, not a key_flags array.
